nasb.text: They also went down with it to Sheol to those who were slain by the sword; and those who were its strength lived under its shade among the nations.

esv.text: They also went down to Sheol with it, to those who are slain by the sword; yes, those who were its arm, who lived under its shadow among the nations.

cnv.text: 這些樹與它一同下到陰間，往那些被刀劍所殺的人那裡去。他們作過它的膀臂，曾在列國中住在它的蔭下。

ccb.text: 在它荫庇下做它爪牙的盟友都与它一同落到阴间，到被杀的人那里。
